title: Korak 24

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
import secrets
import string


def generate_password(length, nums, special_chars, uppercase, lowercase):
    # Define the possible characters for the password
    letters = string.ascii_letters
    digits = string.digits
    symbols = string.punctuation

    # Combine all characters
    all_characters = letters + digits + symbols
    password = ''
    # Generate password
    for _ in range(length):
        password += secrets.choice(all_characters)
    return password

# new_password = generate_password(8)
# print(new_password)
challengeFiles.seed:
import secrets
import string


def generate_password(length, nums, special_chars, uppercase, lowercase):
    # Define the possible characters for the password
    letters = string.ascii_letters
    digits = string.digits
    symbols = string.punctuation

    # Combine all characters
    all_characters = letters + digits + symbols
    password = ''
    # Generate password
    for _ in range(length):
        password += secrets.choice(all_characters)
    return password

tests.text: Trebalo bi da kreirate ciklus while True koji okružuje vašu deklaraciju password koja se nalazi sa krugom for.

description: Postavite svoju deklaraciju password za promenu sledećeg ciklusa for unutar ciklusa while. Koristite True kao uslov za vaš novi ciklus.
